chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3410 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of Misc. No.16011/2023 2. For hearing of main case 26.09.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Mansoor Solangi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Riaz Alam, advocate for the respondent No.4 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition because the same has become infructuous. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as infructuous alongwith listed application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
